title: HetznerLoadBalancerTarget
description: Manages a target on a Hetzner Cloud Load Balancer.

loadBalancerId.description: ID of the Load Balancer this target belongs to.

serverId.description: ID of the Server to add as target. Only valid and required if type is `server`.

labelSelector.description: Label selector string. Adds all matching servers as targets. Only valid and required if type is `label_selector`.

ip.description: IP of a server that belongs to the same customer (public IPv4/IPv6) or private IP in a subnet type vswitch. Only valid and required if type is `ip`.

usePrivateIp.description: Use the private network IP instead of the public IP of the Server, requires the Server and Load Balancer to be in the same network. Only valid for target types `server` and `label_selector`.
